raw: This pass admits up to four (4) visitors at half-price admission. This pass is a physical coupon pass that you can pick up at the Robbins Library, but not the Fox branch. You will need to select a reservation date, but you can apply the coupon discount on any date that you decide to go. Admission includes entry to: The Harvard Museum of Natural History The Peabody Museum of Archaeology & Ethnology The Harvard Museum of the Ancient Near East The Collection of Historical Scientific Instruments.
